summary: Both bug fixes verified working. Bug 1: NewOrderModal no longer closes when clicking outside or pressing Escape, data is preserved. Modal only closes via Cancel button, X button, or successful order creation. Bug 2: Column management buttons (Add column, Column manager) only visible for admins. Column drag-and-drop is disabled for regular users (draggable=false). All 12 test cases passed.
features_tested: Bug 1: NewOrderModal does NOT close on overlay click - PASS
Bug 1: NewOrderModal does NOT close on Escape key - PASS
Bug 1: Form data preserved after overlay click - PASS
Bug 1: Form data preserved after Escape key - PASS
Bug 1: NewOrderModal CLOSES via Cancel button - PASS
Bug 1: Custom X button visible (default hidden via CSS) - PASS
Bug 1: NewOrderModal CLOSES via custom X button - PASS
Bug 1: NewOrderModal CLOSES after successful order creation - PASS
Bug 2: Add Column button visible for admin - PASS
Bug 2: Column Manager button visible for admin - PASS
Bug 2: Column Manager panel opens for admin - PASS
Bug 2: Column draggable=true for admin - PASS
Bug 2: Add Column button NOT visible for regular user - PASS
Bug 2: Column Manager button NOT visible for regular user - PASS
Bug 2: Column draggable=false for regular user - PASS

issues: Hydration warnings in console (span inside tr/tbody) - cosmetic, does not affect functionality - existing issue from previous iterations
Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility warning, not affecting functionality

NewOrderModal.js.line_137: onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) return; }} - correctly blocks closing via state change
NewOrderModal.js.line_138: onInteractOutside={(e) => e.preventDefault()} - correctly blocks overlay clicks
NewOrderModal.js.line_138_2: onEscapeKeyDown={(e) => e.preventDefault()} - correctly blocks Escape key
NewOrderModal.js.line_138_3: [&>button:last-child]:hidden - hides default Radix DialogClose X button
NewOrderModal.js.line_141: Custom X button with onClick={onClose} correctly closes modal
NewOrderModal.js.line_152: Cancel button correctly closes modal via onClose prop

Dashboard.js.line_370: isAdmin && wraps Add column button - correct
Dashboard.js.line_371: isAdmin && wraps Column manager button - correct
Dashboard.js.line_376: showColumnManager && isAdmin && wraps column manager panel - correct
Dashboard.js.line_517: draggable={isAdmin} on th elements - correctly disables drag for non-admins
Dashboard.js.lines_126-128: User view config only loads filters and group_by_date (not hidden_columns/column_order) - correct
Dashboard.js.lines_143-149: Config save only includes filters and group_by_date - correct

seed_data_creation: Created admin and regular user test sessions via MongoDB for UI testing. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes for NewOrderModal and admin-only column management verified. NewOrderModal uses onInteractOutside, onEscapeKeyDown with preventDefault(), and custom X button with hidden default close button via CSS class [&>button:last-child]:hidden. Dashboard.js wraps column management UI in isAdmin checks and sets draggable={isAdmin} on column headers.
